---
description: Applies to scientific figure and visualization tasks across all workspaces
---

For scientific figures and manuscript visualizations:
- prioritize clarity, hierarchy, and restraint
- avoid dashboard-like or decorative styling
- prefer direct labels over bulky legends where practical
- use restrained, colorblind-safe palettes
- keep typography and spacing consistent
- propose a brief critique before revising a figure
- prefer reproducible code and vector export where possible
